common.priceDisclaimer: Price data sourced from official websites. For reference only. Actual prices may vary.

lmarena.title: LM Arena Leaderboard
lmarena.description: Explore crowdsourced model rankings across different task dimensions based on LMSYS Chatbot Arena data.

search.label: Search LM Arena leaderboards
search.placeholder: Search models, providers, licenses or leaderboards...

lmarena.methodologyDescription: Rankings are based on anonymous, head-to-head model battles voted on by real users. Rating scales can differ between leaderboards, so scores are best compared within the same leaderboard rather than across tasks.
lmarena.ratingDescription: A relative capability score calculated from community battle outcomes. Higher values indicate stronger performance within the current leaderboard.
lmarena.votesDescription: The number of valid community votes collected through anonymous model battles, indicating the evidence behind each rating.
lmarena.noResultsDescription: Try another model name, provider, or leaderboard keyword.

home.heroDescription: Compare pricing from {providerCount} major providers across {modelCount} models. Find the AI model that fits your budget.
home.priceNote: Note: Prices are per million tokens (/M). Data sourced from official websites. Some models have tiered pricing; standard rates shown. Please verify with official pricing.

modelDetail.pricingDescription: Current published rates across available billing types and tiers.
modelDetail.costDescription: Enter your expected daily usage for each billing type.
modelDetail.costNote: Estimates use the current standard tier and exclude taxes, free quotas, batch discounts and provider-specific pricing.
modelDetail.historyDescription: Recorded changes to standard model pricing.
modelDetail.noHistory: No price changes have been recorded for this model yet.

calculator.title: Token Calculator
calculator.description: Estimate tokens, calculate costs, and plan your AI budget
calculator.pasteText: Paste your text here to estimate token count...
calculator.tokenNote: Token count is an estimate. Actual count may vary slightly between different models and tokenizers.
calculator.budgetNote: See how many input tokens your budget can afford, assuming 1M input is paired with 0.5M output.

tips.title: Tips:
tips.tip1: 1 token ≈ 4 English characters or ≈ 0.6 Chinese characters
tips.tip2: Output tokens are typically 2-4x more expensive than input tokens
tips.tip3: Consider using cached input pricing for repeated prompts to save costs

compare.title: Model Comparison
compare.emptyDescription: Add up to 4 models to compare their pricing, capabilities, and parameters side by side.
compare.addMorePrompt: Add another model to start comparing

benchmarks.title: Model Performance Benchmarks
benchmarks.description: View model performance across different capability dimensions to help you choose the best AI model

categoryDescriptions.reasoning: Knowledge Q&A, logical reasoning and complex problem solving
categoryDescriptions.coding: Code generation, programming ability and software engineering
categoryDescriptions.math: Mathematical problem solving, logical operations and numerical computation
categoryDescriptions.longContext: Long text understanding, long context memory and processing
categoryDescriptions.comprehensive: Comprehensive evaluation and multi-dimensional capability testing

benchmarks.noResultsDescription: Try another benchmark, model, or provider keyword, or reset the category filter.
benchmarks.methodologyDescription: This page aggregates results from public benchmark platforms. Task coverage, scoring methods, and dataset versions differ between benchmarks, so scores are best compared within the same test and should be validated against your real use case.

news.title: Model News
news.description: Track the latest AI model releases, price changes, and industry updates
news.emptyDescription: There are no model news at the moment. Check back later.
news.footerNote: News content is curated and published by administrators from official vendor channels.

subscribe.title: Subscribe to model updates
subscribe.description: Enter your email and we'll notify you when model prices, rankings, or new releases change.
subscribe.success: Verification email sent. Please check your inbox and click the verification link to complete your subscription. You won't receive updates until your email is verified.
subscribe.errorGeneric: Subscription failed. Please check your email address or try again later.

verify.success: Your email has been verified. You're now subscribed to TokenAcorn updates.
verify.error: Verification failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

unsubscribe.success: You've unsubscribed from TokenAcorn updates. You will no longer receive emails.
unsubscribe.error: Unsubscribe failed. The link may be expired or invalid.

footer.disclaimer: Price data sourced from official websites. For reference only.
footer.slogan: Every token wisely spent is a seed for great AI.
